title: Estuary 4 · the campaign
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed.

entries.title: The course-correction
entries.blurb: Oneironautics, 2005, set 2016: a studio imagining a near future where somebody finally goes back and fixes the water. Bigger than anything they'd made and quieter than all of it - the future, as imagined by these people, looked like better weather, not better screens.

entries.title: The one person, carefully
entries.blurb: A fourth folder in the archive: the December 2003 king-tide notebook, two ruled lines per station, some held blank on purpose. Your hand. The Tideline promised somebody would read it carefully; it took the county thirteen years to grow you.

entries.title: Four hours, no shortcuts
entries.blurb: Ashford Cade walked the whole restoration line and disagreed with the paper in exactly two places, and was right about one. Paper is sure everywhere; a hunter is sure only where he has stood. 'Spring after next, I'll walk it again and tell you what you got right.'
